data.strength: The best collective outcome would be if everyone contributed all 20 coins every round and then didn't deduct anything the following rounds. So, I would always contribute the full 20 coins every round as well as deduct coins from the people who didn't contribute anything as a form of punishment. After a while, though, more and more people stopped contributing to the pot, and so I eventually stopped "punishing" people because it wasn't working anymore.
I studied other player's move in the first rounds and played safe.
